explore-img-mc002.query: Beneath every surface, inside every body of water, and floating in the very air we breathe — microscopic organisms form the foundation of all life on Earth. They recycle nutrients, produce oxygen, and maintain the delicate balance of our biosphere. Microscopic Life Forms The microcosmos is a parallel universe teeming with organisms so small they defy comprehension. From the elegant geometry of diatoms to the alien grace of tardigrades, every drop of water holds an entire world. Life at the Smallest Scale
